title: Nigeria Faces 18-Month Economic Recovery, Says CFG Advisory CEO - FinancialEDGE
description: The Chief Executive Officer of CFG Advisory, Tilewa Adebajo has projected that Nigeria's economic recovery will span 18 months, commencing in 2024. Adebajo made this prediction while delivering a presentation titled "Nigeria's Fiscal Environment in an Era of Monetary Policy Tightening" at the June 2024 edition of the Finance Correspondents Association of Nigeria (FICAN) in
html: The Chief Executive Officer of CFG Advisory, Tilewa Adebajo has projected that Nigeria’s economic recovery will span 18 months, commencing in 2024.
